Bash(CAST_COMMIT_AGENT=1 git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(home-view\): dynamic agent count from health API

Agent Tier card now fetches agentCount from health endpoint instead of hardcoded value, keeping UI synchronized with live agent registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(CAST_COMMIT_AGENT=1 git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(live-view\): node graph visualization with @xyflow/react

Add interactive dispatch graph canvas with agent nodes, animated edges, and
batch grouping. Includes graph layout algorithm that organizes orchestrators
in top row and sub-agent batches below with parallel detection. New components:
AgentNode \(agent card display with live elapsed timer, model tier badge, and
glow effects\), AnimatedEdge \(status-colored flow paths\), BatchGroupNode
\(visual batch group container\), DispatchGraph \(ReactFlow canvas wrapper\), and
graphLayout utility \(hierarchical layout + batch grouping algorithm\). Add
graph/list view toggle in LiveView header with localStorage persistence.
Dependencies: @xyflow/react@^12.10.1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(CAST_COMMIT_AGENT=1 git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(live-view\): expand tool visibility — all events, scrollable feed, color-coded icons, timestamps

Improve operational transparency in agent monitoring:
- AgentCard: remove 12-event cap, add scrollable max-h-64 container, show all tool calls
- Tool icons: color-code by type \(Bash=orange, Read=sky, Write=emerald, Edit=amber, etc.\)
- Input preview: no text truncation \(break-all\), timestamps on each row
- Tool feed header: display total call count
- SSE formatter: expand limits 200→500 chars for better context
- Grep tool: show pattern + path + glob in preview
- Agent dispatch: display [subagent_type] + 300 chars of prompt
- Default view mode: changed from 'graph' to 'list' \(graph remains toggleable\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(CAST_COMMIT_AGENT=1 git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
refactor\(live-view\): remove react flow graph visualization

Revert @xyflow/react integration and node graph feature. List view is
now the only dispatch chain visualization mode. Removes viewMode state
and toggle UI from LiveView and DispatchChain components.

Deleted:
- AgentNode.tsx, AnimatedEdge.tsx, BatchGroupNode.tsx \(node components\)
- DispatchGraph.tsx \(graph renderer\)
- graphLayout.ts \(layout algorithms\)

Changes:
- Remove viewMode state and localStorage persistence from LiveView
- Remove graph/list toggle buttons and icons from header
- Remove DispatchGraph conditional rendering from DispatchChain
- Remove @xyflow/react from package.json

The list view provides sufficient context for dispatch chain visualization
and simplifies the UI surface.
EOF
\)")

Bash(CAST_COMMIT_AGENT=1 git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(live-view\): compact history mode — header-only chain rows

Add compact prop to DispatchChain for history chains. In compact mode, chains display header-only \(prompt preview, status pills, project badge, timestamp\) without expand toggle or nested agent cards. Reduces vertical scroll burden in long history sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(CAST_COMMIT_AGENT=1 git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix\(live-view,error-boundary\): handle stale agent states and add crash protection

- ErrorBoundary wraps lazy-loaded views to prevent render crashes from hiding behind Suspense fallback
- LiveView now properly completes agents in both 'running' and 'stale' states instead of only 'running'
- Stale agents that receive new activity are un-staled back to 'running' to resume tracking
- Fixes race condition where agents could remain visually "stale" even after their completion event arrived

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
